summary: Completed testing of CyberDeck DJ Turntable app after CORS fix implementation. Backend APIs working perfectly with audio stream proxy functional. Frontend loads correctly but audio playback verification incomplete due to browser environment limitations.

ui_bugs.issue: HTTP images loaded on HTTPS site cause security warnings
ui_bugs.details: Station favicon URLs use HTTP protocol, causing browser warnings

integration_issues.issue: Unable to fully verify audio playback due to headless browser limitations
integration_issues.impact: Cannot confirm turntable spinning, visualizer animation, or VU meter response to actual audio
integration_issues.workaround: Audio stream proxy tested successfully with backend test

passed_tests: Station fetching for all genres (hip hop, rnb, trap, soul)
Frontend app loading with intro animation
Station browser opens and displays 26+ stations
Genre tabs functional (HIP HOP, R&B, TRAP, SOUL)
Cyberpunk theme and UI styling correct

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All APIs including audio proxy working
success_percentage.audio_integration: 80% - Stream proxy works, playback verification limited by test environment

action_item_for_main_agent.issue: Mixed content warnings for station favicon images
action_item_for_main_agent.description: Station favicon URLs use HTTP protocol causing browser security warnings on HTTPS site
suggested_fixes: Filter out HTTP favicon URLs or proxy them through HTTPS
Use placeholder images for stations with HTTP favicons

action_item_for_main_agent.issue: Add more data-testid attributes for better testability
action_item_for_main_agent.description: Some UI components lack data-testid attributes making automated testing difficult
suggested_fixes: Add data-testid to turntable spinning element
Add data-testid to visualizer and VU meter components
